reviews.review_text: Ein sehr sympathischer Campingplatz mit interessanten Menschen.

Great park, caravan sites had double slab very convenient, amenities are a little dated but are very clean and worked well. Perfect spot for exploring/shopping in the Sydney area it's fairly centrally located. Park also pet friendly.

Great location staff wonderful stayed here a few times now and couldn't be happier  very quiet friendly atmosphere great start for our second trip around Australia. [  except for the fuel price, it is what it is. Thank you guys for a wonderful stay.
Very good

Clean tidy and good showers with plenty of space to get changed. Camp kitchen is well set up with toaster, air fryer,books to read. Good washing facilities with one dollar slot machines.Not too noisy next to the road and abundant bird life. They have a caravan and truck storage area. Staff are friendly and polite.

Super Lage in Sydney. Das Personal ist sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Allerdings nerven die täglichen Gärtnerarbeiten am Vormittag. Die Toiletten/ Duschen sind sehr gut, auch wenn der erste optische Eindruck etwas einfach ist. Die Stellplätze habe wenig Schatten.
Kleine Korrekturbund einen Punkt Abzug: Der Mann mit dem Laubbläser um 8:00 Uhr geht mir echt auf die Nerven.

We stayed at Sydney Tourist Park for two nights with our caravan and it was perfect. The staff were friendly and welcoming, and the park itself is very well maintained. The shower and toilet blocks were clean and well looked after, which always makes a big difference.

The park is easy to find and conveniently located close to the train station, making it really handy for getting around. Westfield Shopping Centre is also close by, which was great for groceries and a bit of shopping.

There’s a great undercover communal area where you can cook food and even borrow books to relax and read, which was a really nice touch. Overall, it’s a comfortable, relaxed park and suitable for everyone. We would definitely stay again and highly recommend it.

Voldoende goed.  Je weet dat je hier geen super luxe kan verwachten.
Maar dit is echt boven verwachting goed.

Aanrader als u in Sydney met de campervan of motorman langs wilt.

Pleasantly surprised.
Yes its old but amenities are always clean.
Handy to a big Westfield Shopping Centre.  Just a short drive.
Train not far away.
If you want to use the washing machines and dryers bring $1 coins.
Great park. Clean, tidy close to shops and transport. Owners are great caring people
Sehr unkompliziert dort, und super freundliches personal. Auch die duschen und die Toiletten sind sehr sauber

Park is pretty average and not visually appealing from the get go with stacks of shopping trolleys at the entry and rubbish and could use some TLC. Main things going for it are location, low cost and pet friendly. Need to book well in advance as 90% of the park is long term or permanent residents which are fairly rundown with some even partially demolished. Paid for a gas refill @ $30 and only got about 60% filled (based on our gas monitors) didn't dispute it as it's my word against theirs. Camp kitchen is super basic and amenities are an old shipping container, combined shower/tiolets, 3 female and 3 male, floors were always wet from the showers.
Not a bad place I'm staying for a week
Ruhig gelegen, nicht luxuriös aber alles da, alles rein?
It was surprisingly very nice. Very comfortable for us. Toilets and showers very clean. Friendly people. We enjoyed our stay!
$15 to use dump point is excessive. Not recommended.

A lovely spot for coming into Sydney (1st time) staff wonderful.  It has some permanents to be expected nowadays..nice.
Facilities very nice. Concrete/grass sites. Would come come back again.. thank you
Great bunch of people to stay with recommend highly for all the family!!..

Wir waren für eine Nacht hier und haben 56AUD für einen Stellplatz mit Elektrizität gezahlt. Es gibt im vorderen Bereich nur Duschen, WC und Waschbecken zusammen. Diese waren sauber, aber wenn man duscht ist der ganze Raum nass, was für den nächsten nicht so toll ist. Die Sanitäranlagen sind auch alles Container. Die Campingküche ist auch offen und nur überdacht. Der Platz ist nicht abgesperrt und somit für alle zugänglich. Mit der Dame am Empfang hatten wir nicht viel zu tun, da sie mir das fertige Kuvert nir in die Hand gegeben hat. Für eine Nacht war er für uns ok.

Like a parking with many people that live there
Bathroom clean
Kitchen dirdy
A lot of noisy of traffic
Terrible!

Wow location location location
Owner Peter loverly fella Michelle reception and Paul are  amazing . The amenities very clean amenities been to many many parks rate this up with the best staying for one month . Awesome highly recommend fair rates for location close to Westfield Miranda and transport to city just at your front door what else can we ask for .. but no pool . Close to beaches Cronulla Brighton le sands restaurants galore for us 10/10
Very nice park quite location friendly people

Perfect for the last night, to be close to Caringbah to take our camper back early the next morning. Organised, clean and quite private with a thick hedge around our pitch for a powered camper. There are only 3 female and 3 male toilets and showers but I never had to wait for one. Dustbin available for offloading our left overs, which was handy.

Lo único positivo de este park es que está cerca del aeropuerto de Sydney. Comparado con el resto de los camping de la costa este, deja mucho que desear. No tiene seguridad y te piden que firmes que lo que dejas en el campamento es tu responsabilidad. Los baños necesitan mantenimientos y no estaban limpios, los pisos siempre mojados. No hay espacios de recreación. La mujer que atiende no tiene buenos modales. Diría que solo si no te queda otra alternativa lo elijas,

The only good thing about the park is the location to Sydney. Do not take children there as this is not a park you can let them wander and play on their own,  no playground or even a area for the kids. One grass patch with a hills hoist on it. Mainly permanent sites, with some questionable and grumpy tenants, the struggling community is encouraged in the park on Mondays with a free bread drive by volunteers, and some homeless people were seen using the amenities on occasions.

AVOID AT ALL COSTS!! Tiny spots, little to no grass, dirty water taps, the floor of the bathroom wasn’t dry once on our stay. I felt like we were going to be robbed the whole time and the staff are hardly ever there. There is also no boom gate or gates at all, which leaves the whole park open to anyone's who wants to come in. It’s just a dreary, cold, depressing concrete block that they squish a bunch of caravans in and call it a ‘park’. AND $56 A NIGHT FOR THIS IS CRAZZYYYY, I wouldn’t be happy staying here for free, you’d have to pay me to stay here again. HORRIBLE.
Convenient location

We stayed in the park from 30 April to 5 May 2024 on site 106. We have an 8 m van inc drawbar. Could drive straight in on a double concrete slab. Water, electricity, and Gray water right beside the van centrally located. Office hours are 2 hours morning and night. An envelope was waiting for us when we arrived with instructions. Would definitely stay again.
The toilets and showers were very clean plenty of hot water.
Left our Motorhome in storage for 3 weeks and it was still there and untouched when we picked it up.  Thanks Folks
The staff were extremely helpful.

Camping het dichts gelegen bij Sydney met OV naar de stad voor de deur. Dat is dan ook het enige voordeel. Ziet er allemaal wat sjofel uit en het sanitair (wel schoon) zou een opknapbeurt kunnen gebruiken.

Eenvoudige maar prima camping.
Wij hebben onze camper vlakbij opgepikt en hier naartoe gereden.
Winkels in de buurt.
Metro naar Downtown Sydney dichtbij (15min lopen) dus prima.

I've had two stays here. Staff helpful and friendly.  Quiet within the park.  All clean and maintained. There is road noise, but that's to be expected for a city park. Location is great, able to get to many places easy, lots of shopping choices nearby.  Site 35 for both stays

Short Q & A.
Management ✅👍 Ecellent. Helpful, cheerful & Knows his Park & job.
Amenities ✅ Cleaned multiple times throughout the day, always clean & stocked.
Kitchen✅ Cleaned regularly daily.
Laundry ✅ again regularly maintained.
Tv reception. ✅ Good ,( but via computer or tablet works well as well.
Phone reception. ✅✅ 5G- 4bar. 4G-4bar.
Pets✅. Friendly, no strays  off leashes.
Fuels .✅ metro 300 metres.
Water, fuel , fast food, auto supplies, & so - on
Miranda fair 2K away.
Pricing✅ In - Line.
Sites👍✅👍 Drive throughs aren't the many, but excellent, all other sites are easy enough even at 21ft. ( Management attentive to the needs of his patrons.)

All-in-All.    I can't give it a 5 Star rating , because it's a 6⭐️
Stayed a couple of times while in Sydney. My choice for a clean & central caravan park.  Reasonable rates also. Recommended.

One of the few caravan parks left in Sydney easy to find, neat and tidy nothing fancy just a safe place to park if you need something in Sydney. Nothing for children 50% of park is permanent. Good size spaces and camp kitchen with ensuite style unisex bathrooms.
My compliments to the owner and manager - very friendly- very professional 10 out of 10.
One of the few left in the shire..maybe 3 caravan parks .it's called SYDNEY TOURIST PARK, Also a storage space for caravans motorhomes and boats too...fyi
Great location and nice and quiet, toilets clean and regularly maintained. Public TPT just out the front gate. Couldn't ask for better
Cracking place on the south side of Sydney. Park staff are always happy to help. Neighbours are lovely. Will be staying here again.
Older style caravan park but clean and well maintained. The camp kitchen and toilet-shower block are kept spotless. Will definitely be back.
Good location but very compact
New management extremely helpful an older Park with older facilities but kept extremely clean Stayed for 2 weeks and will stay again close to where we needed to be.
